LAW AND MOTION 504, DEFENDANT BOOKER T WASHINGTON COMMUNITY SERVICES CENTER'S DEMURRER TO 2ND AMENDED COMPLAINT. THE COURT ADOPTS ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: THE DEMURRER IS OVERRULED. THE SECOND AMENDED COMPLAINT (SAC) ADEQUATELY PLEADS FACTS ESTABLISHING EQUITABLE ESTOPPEL AS TO THE STATUTE OF LIMITATIONS (SAC, PAR. 23) AND PARTIAL PERFORMANCE OF THE AGREEMENT AS TO THE STATUTE OF FRAUDS (SAC, PARS. 12-16, 20). THE COURT DOES NOT CONSIDER ARGUMENTS RAISED FOR THE FIRST TIME IN REPLY. MR. KNOX IS TO SUBMIT A PROPOSED FORM OF ORDER. JUDGE: PETER J. BUSCH, CLERK: E. LARNAUTI, NOT REPORTED

LAW AND MOTION 504, DEFENDANTS EQUITY COMMUNITY BUILDERS, LLC, BEN GOLVIN, JOHN CLAWSON AND TOM SARGENT'S DEMURRER TO 2ND AMENDED COMPLAINT. THE COURT ADOPTS ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: THE DEMURRER TO THE SECOND AMENDED COMPLAINT (SAC) IS OVERRULED. THE SAC ADEQUATELY PLEADS EQUITABLE ESTOPPEL (SAC, PAR. 23) AND PARTIAL PERFORMANCE (SAC, PARS. 12-16, 20). THEREFORE, THE SAC ADEQUATELY PLEADS THE EXISTENCE OF AN ENFORCEABLE ORAL AGREEMENT (SAC, PAR. 6), THAT DEFENDANTS KNEW OF THAT AGREEMENT (SAC, PAR. 19), THAT DEFENDANTS ACTED INTENTIONALLY TO DISRUPT THE CONTRACTUAL RELATIONSHIP (SAC, PAR. 19), THAT DEFENDANTS ACTUALLY DISRUPTED THE RELATIONSHIP (SAC, PAR. 56), AND THAT PLAINTIFF WAS DAMAGED AS A RESULT (SAC, PAR. 57). MR. KNOX IS TO SUBMIT A PROPOSED FORM OF ORDER. JUDGE: PETER J. BUSCH, CLERK: E. LARNAUTI, NOT REPORTED

LAW AND MOTION 504, DEFENDANTS EQUITY COMMUNITY BUILDERS, LLC, BEN GOLVIN AND TOM SARGENT'S MOTION TO STRIKE 2ND AMENDED COMPLAINT. THE COURT ADOPTS ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: DENIED. THE SECOND AMENDED COMPLAINT ADEQUATELY PLEADS AN INTENT TO INJURE THAT COULD SUPPORT A CLAIM FOR PUNITIVE DAMAGES. MR. KNOX IS TO SUBMIT A PROPOSED FORM OF ORDER. JUDGE: PETER J. BUSCH, CLERK: E. LARNAUTI, NOT REPORTED

MOTION TO STRIKE 2ND AMENDED COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Apr-11-2014 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: DEFENDANT BOOKER T WASHINGTON COMMUNITY SERVICES CENTER'S MOTION TO STRIKE 2ND AMENDED COMPLAINT

Appearances: Robert F. Knox (415.388.9090) appearing for plaintiff and responding party; No other appearances.

This matter is not argued. The Court adopts its tentative ruling as follows: The motion to strike is denied. The Second Amended Complaint adequately pleads facts to support a claim for punitive damages based on fraud. The Court does not consider arguments first raised in reply. Mr. Knox is to submit a proposed form of order. Judge: Peter J. Busch, Clerk: E. Larnauti, Not Reported

DEMURRER TO 2ND AMENDED COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Apr-11-2014 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: DEFENDANT BOOKER T WASHINGTON COMMUNITY SERVICES CENTER'S DEMURRER TO 2ND AMENDED COMPLAINT

Appearances: Robert F. Knox (415.388.9090) appearing for plaintiff and responding party; No other appearances.

This matter is not argued. The Court adopts its tentative ruling as follows: The demurrer is overruled. The Second Amended Complaint (SAC) adequately pleads facts establishing equitable estoppel as to the statute of limitations (SAC, par. 23) and partial performance of the agreement as to the statute of frauds (SAC, pars. 12-16, 20). The Court does not consider arguments raised for the first time in reply. Mr. Knox is to submit a proposed form of order. Judge: Peter J. Busch, Clerk: E. Larnauti, Not Reported

MOTION TO STRIKE 2ND AMENDED COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Apr-11-2014 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: DEFENDANTS EQUITY COMMUNITY BUILDERS, LLC, BEN GOLVIN and TOM SARGENT'S MOTION TO STRIKE 2ND AMENDED COMPLAINT

Appearances: Robert F. Knox (415.388.9090) appearing for plaintiff and responding party; No other appearances.

This matter is not argued. The Court adopts its tentative ruling as follows: Denied. The Second Amended Complaint adequately pleads an intent to injure that could support a claim for punitive damages. Mr. Knox is to submit a proposed form of order. Judge: Peter J. Busch, Clerk: E. Larnauti, Not Reported

DEMURRER TO 2ND AMENDED COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Apr-11-2014 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: DEFENDANTS EQUITY COMMUNITY BUILDERS, LLC, BEN GOLVIN, JOHN CLAWSON and TOM SARGENT'S DEMURRER TO 2ND AMENDED COMPLAINT

Appearances: Robert F. Knox (415.388.9090) appearing for plaintiff and responding party; No other appearances.

This matter is not argued. The Court adopts its tentative ruling as follows: The demurrer to the Second Amended Complaint (SAC) is overruled. The SAC adequately pleads equitable estoppel (SAC, par. 23) and partial performance (SAC, pars. 12-16, 20). Therefore, the SAC adequately pleads the existence of an enforceable oral agreement (SAC, par. 6), that defendants knew of that agreement (SAC, par. 19), that defendants acted intentionally to disrupt the contractual relationship (SAC, par. 19), that defendants actually disrupted the relationship (SAC, par. 56), and that plaintiff was damaged as a result (SAC, par. 57). Mr. Knox is to submit a proposed form of order. Judge: Peter J. Busch, Clerk: E. Larnauti, Not Reported
